name: Rosie O'Donnell
bio: Rosie ODonnell is an American comedian, actress and talk show host who toured comedy clubs in the early 1980s and broke through with winning appearances on Star Search in 1984. She hosted VH1s Stand-Up Spotlight, a showcase for emerging comedians, before launching the Emmy-winning syndicated daytime program The Rosie ODonnell Show.
accolades: Multiple Daytime Emmy Awards for The Rosie ODonnell Show
Five winning appearances on Star Search
